productName: Solr Bear - Live Rosin XL - Cartridge - 1g - (HI) Papaya Punch
description: This hybrid cartridge loads Papaya Punch into a sleek 510-thread pen for clean, convenient draws — premium oil, precise hits, zero hassle. Flavor on the go, with notes of tree fruit, tropical, and citrus, leading into a balanced head-and-body experience.
